zh.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.Burslem, Staffordshire, , England: 英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.Burslem, Stoke-on-Trent district, Staffo: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Adams於1440年出生在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆時，他的父親William Powell Adams53歲，母親Mrs. William Adams32歲。他於大約1459年與Margaret Armager在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1499年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Adams于1440年出生在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆时，他的父亲William Powell Adams53岁，母亲Mrs. William Adams32岁。他于大约1459年与Margaret Armager在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1499年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Umberto, Aldo, Giulio, Paolo, Primo, Silvio.
German: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Adam , from Adami, the Latin genitive. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name   Adamo  . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Adams was born in 1440, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, his father, William Powell Adams, was 53 and his mother, Mrs. William Adams, was 32. He married Margaret Armager about 1459, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1499, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Adams est né en 1440, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Powell Adams, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Adams, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Armager environ 1459, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1499, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Adams 1440 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Powell Adams 53 und seine Mutter Mrs. William Adams 32. Er hat um 1459 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Armager geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1499 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Adams è nato il nel 1440 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William Powell Adams, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William Adams, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Armager circa 1459, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1499, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Adams(이)가 1440년 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Powell Adams(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Adams(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 Margaret Armager(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1499, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Adams родился в 1440 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Powell Adams было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Adams, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Armager около 1459 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1499 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Murió aproximadamente 1499, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
